case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. DENNIS DENNISON

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED JUN-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DENNISON, DENNIS
